SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PPERANCES BY PLAINTIFFS SIMON AND JANET CHAN WITH THE HELP OF SWORN CANTONESE INTERPRETER ESTELLA LIU AND DEFENDANT CAMILA ANDREA BURGOS GALINDO WITH THE HELP OF SWORN SPANISH INTERPRETER JOHN PAUL MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGOS, CAMILA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,590.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
